title: CNBC Daily Open: Generic problems, AI valuations and earnings on tap
summary_full: President Trump takes fresh aim at the pharmaceutical sector, with a plan to levy 100% tariffs on generic drugs as he targets key areas ahead of the midterms.
summary_public: President Trump takes fresh aim at the pharmaceutical sector, with a plan to levy 100% tariffs on generic drugs as he targets key areas ahead of the midterms.
